{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/91727108?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kexinoh/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kexinoh/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kexinoh/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kexinoh/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/kexinoh", "id": 91727108, "login": "kexinoh", "node_id": "U_kgDOBXelBA", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kexinoh/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kexinoh/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kexinoh/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kexinoh/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kexinoh/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/kexinoh", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-41407", "cvss": {"score": 3.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 3.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:N/VC:L/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-208", "name": "Observable Timing Discrepancy"}], "description": "## Summary

Before OpenClaw 2026.4.2, several shared-secret comparison call sites still used early length-mismatch checks instead of the shared fixed-length comparison helper. Those paths could leak secret-length information through measurable timing differences.

## Impact

The affected paths exposed a low-severity timing side channel on secret comparison. The issue did not by itself demonstrate auth bypass, but it weakened the intended constant-time handling for shared secrets.

## Affected Packages / Versions

- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Affected versions: `<= 2026.4.1`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.4.2`
- Latest published npm version: `2026.4.1`

## Fix Commit(s)

- `be10ecef770a4654519869c3641bbb91087c8c7b` — reuse the shared secret comparison helper at affected call sites

## Release Process Note

The fix is present on `main` and is staged for OpenClaw `2026.4.2`. Publish this advisory after the `2026.4.2` npm release is live.

Thanks @kexinoh of Tencent zhuque Lab (https://github.com/Tencent/AI-Infra-Guard) for reporting.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00225, "percentile": 0.1299}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-jj6q-rrrf-h66h", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-07T18:16:03Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jj6q-rrrf-h66h", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-jj6q-rrrf-h66h"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41407"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-28T19:37:44Z", "published_at": "2026-04-07T18:16:03Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-jj6q-rrrf-h66h", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/be10ecef770a4654519869c3641bbb91087c8c7b", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41407", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-timing-side-channel-in-shared-secret-comparison", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-jj6q-rrrf-h66h"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-jj6q-rrrf-h66h", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Shared-secret comparison call sites leaked length information through timing", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-06T02:40:51Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-jj6q-rrrf-h66h", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.4.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.4.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw: Shared-secret comparison call sites leaked length information through timing
